input_text: Mary journeyed to the bathroom. The window was broken. The horse kept in the stable was calm. The guide offered the tourists tea. The students studied hard and passed the exam. Cars are nice. John was yellow. Squirrels can fly. Agatha is in trouble. Muggles can not disappear. Bears eat some boxers. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. Mike is badly defeated. Mr Dursley is an American. Tallinn is probably in Estonia. Eve sent a letter to Tom. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Did the students fail the exam?
